domain: Pest Control ERP + CRM + Technician Mobile App

headings.usage: Use Outfit for all headings to provide a modern, authoritative, and clean corporate feel. Do not use Inter for headings.

body.usage: Use Inter for dense body text, tables, forms, and data visualization to ensure maximum legibility at small sizes.

layout.spacing_system: Use generous padding inside cards (p-6) to prevent text collision. Use tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6) for dashboard grids.

dashboard_grid.rules: Every pixel must be utilized. Use h-full on children to ensure they stretch to match their neighbors.

kanban_board.style: Horizontal scrollable flex container with fixed-width columns (w-80), cards inside should have 1px borders and subtle shadow-sm.

mobile_technician_app.navigation: Bottom tab bar with 4-5 key actions (Home, Schedule, Map, Profile).
mobile_technician_app.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all buttons and interactive elements.
mobile_technician_app.layout: Mobile-first, full-width edge-to-edge cards. Large primary action buttons sticky at the bottom.

cards.style: Sharp edges or max 8px border-radius (rounded-lg). Flat solid background. 1px solid border (border-border). No heavy drop shadows. On hover: -translate-y-1 and shadow-md.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium hover:bg-primary/90 transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-input rounded-md px-4 py-2 hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

inputs_and_forms.style: Shadcn defaults. 1px border, rounded-md, clear focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20). Left-aligned labels.

tables.style: Dense data tables. Sticky headers. 1px border-b on rows. Hover state on rows for better tracking.

modals_and_dialogs.style: Glassmorphism is BANNED for this ERP. Use flat solid backgrounds with a 1px border and a dark overlay (bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have a hover state. Buttons should shift color slightly. Cards should lift (-translate-y-1).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for basic state changes.
motion_and_interactions.modals: Fade in and slight scale up (from 0.95 to 1).

icons.usage: Use consistently sized icons (w-5 h-5 for buttons/menus, w-8 h-8 for empty states). Stroke width 2 or 1.5.

accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on all inputs and buttons.

login_background.usage: Use as a full-bleed background for the login/authentication screen.

technician_avatar_1.usage: Placeholder for technician profile picture in lists and mobile app.

technician_avatar_2.usage: Placeholder for technician profile picture in lists and mobile app.

service_report_hero.description: Pest control specialist using fumigation machine
service_report_hero.usage: Hero image for the marketing/landing page if any, or PDF report cover.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize Shadcn components customized with the defined typography and colors.
Ensure dark mode is supported out-of-the-box by using CSS variables for colors.
The Dashboard must use the 'Control Room' grid pattern: dense, strictly aligned, fully utilizing available space.
The Lead Management pipeline must be a horizontal Kanban board using CSS Flex or Grid.
For the Technician Mobile App view, enforce a mobile-first layout with a bottom navigation bar and large touch targets.
Include 'data-testid' on all buttons, links, form inputs, and key UI components.
Do not use generic placeholder image URLs (like via.placeholder.com). Use the URLs provided in the media section.
Arabic support: Ensure layout uses flexbox gap and standard logical properties (start/end instead of left/right) where possible so RTL can be supported later.
